title: Keurig's K-Mini Mate is a no-frills compact coffee maker that packs a serious flavor punch
description: At just four inches wide, the K-Mini Mate is Keurig's smallest brewer yet, but still manages to deliver the bold flavours we've come to expect from the brand's coffee makers — for less than $100.

title: With 4G connectivity in addition to the usual Wi-Fi, the IMOU AOV PT is the ideal security camera for large properties
description: No Wi-Fi signal? No problem — this solid security camera has you covered, with solar charging and optional on-board storage for your videos as well.

title: The Shark Powerdetect Speed delivers superb cleaning in short bursts, and with a mess-reducing auto-empty dock, it's superb value
description: As a convenient cleaner for short cleans the Shark PowerDetect Speed is as good as they come, especially at this price.

title: The Keurig K-Crema high-pressure coffee maker produces creamy, smooth brews with speed and ease
description: The first Keurig machine with PressureInfusion Technology, the K-Crema is a game-changer for lovers of smooth, flavorful brews.

title: The Dyson HushJet Compact Air Purifier is powerful, quiet, and proof that good things do come in small(ish) packages
description: We put Dyson's smallest-ever purifier to the test to see if its jet engine-inspired technology can still deliver whole-room purification despite its compact size.

title: The Hoover HF3 DynamicClean is a feather-light budget cordless stick vacuum that gets the basics right
description: This lightweight cordless vacuum cleaner is reasonably priced, with great anti-wrap hair tech, but its battery life is relatively short.

title: The Philips Norelco i9000 Prestige Ultra Day & Night delivers flagship rotary shaving with a sci-fi twist
description: This flagship shaver from Philips is smooth, smart, and slightly over-engineered.

title: IKEA's donut-shaped Varmblixt smart lamp shines candy-colored light anywhere in your home, though the app experience isn't quite as sweet
description: This lamp is guaranteed to grab guests' attention, but if you're new to smart home tech, you may prefer to skip the app and use its remote control instead.

title: I tested the Hoover HL2 TurboStyle — a lightweight upright vacuum cleaner that punches above its weight, mostly
description: This corded vacuum cleaner is very reasonably priced, and punches well above its weight despite a few quirks.

title: The Laifen P3 Pro is a fantastic travel shaver with great battery life, but not suitable for more beardy users
description: A compact travel shaver with great battery life that performs as advertised — though a trimmer attachment would've been nice for beard-havers.

title: Shark's SilkiPro Straight made my curly hair shine bright –I just wish it was easier to use
description: The Shark SilkiPro Straight costs less than its rivals, includes more in the box, and delivers impressive results, albeit with a few caveats.

title: The Melitta AromaFresh Therm Pro is an almost-great drip coffee maker — but it's let down by its most novel feature
description: The AromaFresh Therm Pro grinds exactly the right amount of beans for your brew, but the uneven results mean inconsistent flavor from your coffee.

title: The T3 Aire 360 is the closest I've got to Dyson Airwrap-style results without paying Dyson prices
description: The next-generation T3 Aire 360 delivers impressive results at a price that undercuts its closest rivals

title: The Reolink Solar Floodlight Cam floods your property with dazzling light to deter would-be burglars
description: With a solar panel for extra power and a MicroSD card slot for local storage, it's a supremely practical way to protect your home.

title: The Narwal Flow 2 an AI-forward robot vacuum and mop that uses its smarts to determine how dirty your floor is, and the best way to clean it

title: 'A blast from the past': The Maxell Wireless Cassette Player is a magic carpet ride of audio nostalgia
description: The Maxell Wireless Cassette Player is a nifty blend of old and new, bringing your old tapes to your ears without the need for a wired pair of headphones.

title: Dyson's latest floor cleaner is a super-slim electric mop that got my hard floors sparkling in minutes
description: The Dyson PencilWash couldn't be easier to use, and makes light work of wet and dry dirt, but only if your wallet can stand it.

title: The Saros 20 is a predictably accomplished addition to Roborock's robot vacuum lineup, delivering all-round cleaning excellence

title: The Segway Navimow i210E LiDAR Pro delivers orderly autonomous mowing with impressive navigation accuracy
description: Segway's latest robot mower brings composed performance to challenging terrain

title: The Revamp Tri-Care is heavy and awkward, but I can't fault how well it dries and protects my hair
